programs.title: Single Black Female 3: The Final Chapter
programs.desc: After being wrongfully convicted of murder, Monica has finally been proven innocent. All charges have been dropped and the police have shifted their focus to Simone, their number-one person of interest.

programs.title: Ppang Car Road 2
programs.desc: From Seoul to Busan, this spectacular eating show takes place at famous bakeries/patisseries to give the dessert lovers the glimpse of tasty goodness of some of the most-coveted desserts of all.

programs.title: Hit-And-Miss Tour
programs.desc: With high expectations, the Dokbakz arrive in Australia, where nature and art coexist. After landing at Sydney Airport, they are eager to explore one of the city's most famous landmarks: the Opera House.

programs.title: Zombie House Flipping
programs.desc: Dolmar thinks he hit a homerun with a zombie outside Tampa. As they start to renovate, it's discovered that this house will need a new roof, flooring and an industrial clean-out of the in-ground pool.

programs.title: Masterchef Australia
programs.desc: MasterChef legend Daren Purchese returns with his toughest challenge yet. Darren's exquisite Cherry Blossom dessert will push the novice cooks to their limits as they try to replicate it in four hours.

programs.title: Jason's Table: Masterful Dishes
programs.desc: Pantoh is a Taiwanese dining experience where guests enjoy exquisite dishes in open-air venues. Chef Ah-yong showcases an emblematic dish of pantoh cuisine: calamari, sea snail, and leek soup.
